overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character progresses from an avenue lined with sphinx statues, ascends stairs, passes through a massive pylon gateway with hieroglyphic reliefs, and explores inner courtyards decorated with flower petals and scaffolding.

events.description: child NPC runs past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone avenue lined with sphinx statues and palm trees

notable_agents.action: child running quickly past the camera toward the left

entered.detail: row of black sphinx statues lining both sides of the avenue
tall stone obelisk with golden tip visible in the distance
tall palm trees scattered along the avenue edges
wide stone tiled walkway with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grand open avenue flanked by large sphinx statues on both sides. The scene is bright and sunny with an obelisk visible in the distance and palm trees lining the path. A child runs past the camera as the character proceeds forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple staircase with large potted plants

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple platform
tall stone wall of the temple structure with decorative elements
large decorative planters with palm fronds

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by temple walls and large potted plants. The sphinx-lined avenue falls behind as the character climbs toward the massive temple gateway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive pylon gateway with colossal pharaoh statues

events.description: reaches top of stairs and approaches the towering pylon gateway
enters the shadow cast by the massive gateway structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand temple gateway flanked by colossal pharaoh statues and flag poles

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at attention near the entrance
temple guard standing at attention near the entrance

entered.detail: towering stone gateway with hieroglyphic reliefs and colorful painted details
colossal standing statues of pharaohs flanking the entrance
tall poles with red banners mounted on top of the pylon
detailed Egyptian hieroglyphs carved into the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches an imposing pylon gateway adorned with hieroglyphs and flanked by colossal pharaoh statues. Red banners flutter atop the structure as the character passes through the shadow of the gateway, with temple guards standing at attention.

events.description: passes through the gateway into the enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage with detailed hieroglyphs covering both walls

entered.detail: tall walls covered in colorful Egyptian murals and hieroglyphic inscriptions

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor where both walls are covered in elaborate hieroglyphic paintings and carvings. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating a more diffused lighting environment as the character proceeds toward the inner courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with flower decorations and construction scaffolding

events.description: exits the corridor into the open inner courtyard
walks across the courtyard floor covered in scattered flower petals and ceremonial greenery

agents.ego_description: walking through the decorated courtyard observing the flower arrangements and construction scaffolding

notable_agents.action: workers standing near scaffolding on the left side of the courtyard

entered.detail: open courtyard space surrounded by temple walls
scattered colorful flower petals and greenery covering the stone floor
large patterned rugs laid across the stone pavement
tall ceremonial vases with decorative patterns
wooden construction scaffolding against the left wall indicating renovation work
circular stone fountain structure in the middle of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit inner courtyard where the ground is covered with scattered flower petals and decorative rugs. Large vases and a central fountain adorn the space, while wooden scaffolding on the left side indicates ongoing construction or renovation work. Workers are visible near the scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctuary entrance with massive bull statues

events.description: approaches the inner sanctuary flanked by large bull statues

agents.ego_description: approaching the final temple entrance guarded by massive bull statues

notable_agents.action: guard standing in the doorway of the inner sanctuary

entered.detail: massive black bull statues with white markings flanking the entrance
dark doorway leading into the innermost sanctuary of the temple

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the inner sanctuary entrance, flanked by two massive bull statues. The doorway ahead leads into the darker interior of the temple, with a guard visible standing watch at the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open ceremonial avenue into the sheltered and ornate depths of an ancient Egyptian temple. It begins with the character walking past towering sphinxes and palm trees under a brilliant sun, before turning to ascend a wide stone staircase that leaves the open avenue behind. As the character reaches the summit, the scene shifts from open light to the imposing shadow of a pylon gateway adorned with hieroglyphs and colossal statues, leading into a narrow, diffused corridor of elaborate wall carvings. The camera then emerges into a sunlit inner courtyard scattered with flower petals and rugs, passing by wooden scaffolding and workers before finally approaching the dark threshold of the inner sanctuary guarded by massive bull statues.
